name_en: ✨M14194 White Color Mini Baguette Series Nano Diane JhLt Baguette Handbag M14194 White Color (Three Colors - Takashi Murakami) The Nano Diane, crafted from two-tone Monogram Empreinte LT leather, is a miniature version of the iconic Diane bag. This meticulously crafted piece features all key details of the original design, including a round flap, piped edges, and a strap-style magnetic closure. Its detachable handle and detachable adjustable shoulder strap offer different carrying options. Dimensions: 19 x 10.5 x 6 cm
